mainEntity.name: What steps must Houston attorneys take to rank in AI Overviews for family law queries?
mainEntity.text: What steps must Houston attorneys take to rank in AI Overviews for family law queries?

acceptedAnswer.text: Houston family law attorneys rank in AI Overviews by: 1) Publishing Texas-specific divorce mediation guides; 2) Optimizing for voice search; 3) Accumulating client reviews; 4) Using structured data for processes.

suggestedAnswer.text: Google AI favors procedural content for family law. Houston lawyers should create step-by-step Texas divorce resources, target long-tail queries like 'Houston child custody timeline,' and integrate video testimonials. This counters directory dominance; track with tools like Ahrefs for AI snippet opportunities.

name: Step-by-Step: Houston Family Law in Google AI Overviews
